title: Terms & Conditions acceptance during signup
description: Verify user must accept legal protection terms before creating account

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill valid user details in signup form
Do NOT check the Terms & Conditions checkbox
Click signup button
Verify error message appears: 'Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.'
Check the Terms & Conditions checkbox
Click signup button again
Verify successful signup and navigation to profile setup

title: Terms of Service dialog displays legal protection clause
description: Verify Terms of Service contains the critical legal protection clause

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Click on 'Terms of Service' link
Verify dialog opens with title 'Terms of Service'
Verify text contains: 'IMPORTANT LEGAL PROTECTION'
Verify text contains: 'CarMate is strictly a cost-sharing platform, not a commercial taxi service'
Verify text contains: 'bear no legal liability for any incidents, accidents, or disputes'
Verify text contains: 'intermediary (aggregator)'
Verify text contains: 'IT Act Section 79'
Click 'Close' button
Verify dialog closes and returns to signup screen

title: Privacy Policy dialog displays compliance information
description: Verify Privacy Policy contains data protection and law enforcement clauses

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Click on 'Privacy Policy' link
Verify dialog opens with title 'Privacy Policy'
Verify text contains: 'Data Collection & Purpose'
Verify text contains: 'location data during active rides only for safety'
Verify text contains: 'Camera access is used exclusively for Driving License (DL) and Vehicle Registration (RC) verification'
Verify text contains: 'shared with law enforcement agencies upon valid legal request'
Verify text contains: 'exported for police investigation if required'
Click 'Close' button
Verify dialog closes and returns to signup screen

title: Cost-sharing policy visibility in app
description: Verify cost-sharing policy is clearly stated in Terms of Service

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Click on 'Terms of Service' link
Verify text contains: 'CarMate facilitates cost-sharing for fuel and tolls only'
Verify text contains: 'No commercial profit activities allowed'
Verify text contains: 'private arrangements between drivers and passengers'

title: SOS emergency system functionality
description: Verify SOS button triggers emergency alerts to admin

steps.description: Login as regular user
Navigate to main screen with SOS button
Long press SOS button for 2 seconds
Verify SOS confirmation dialog appears
Verify dialog shows: 'Emergency alert has been sent to the admin team'
Click 'OK' to close dialog
Login as admin user
Navigate to admin SOS monitoring screen
Verify SOS alert appears in admin dashboard
Verify alert shows user details and location

title: Admin SOS resolution functionality
description: Verify admin can resolve SOS alerts and mark as resolved

steps.description: Login as admin user
Navigate to admin SOS monitoring screen
Click 'View on Map' button for active SOS alert
Verify Google Maps opens with alert location
Return to app and click 'Mark as Resolved' button
Verify success message: 'SOS Alert resolved.'
Verify alert is removed from active alerts list
